query_text: freeride ski that is NOT playful, stiff with high stability, over 105mm waist

results.explanation: Nordica Enforcer 100 strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness, powder_float. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "good playfulness for an all-mountain ski"

Volkl Mantra M6 strongly matches on: playfulness, stability_at_speed. Weak match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Playfulness is low — it's a serious tool for serious skiers"

Rossignol Black Ops Sender Ti strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Built for steep terrain; the Sender Ti is one of the stiffest freeride skis available" Review: "powers through anything but not very playful"

Dynastar M-Free 108 strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "Not as stiff but more playful" Review: "Not outstanding in any single category but competent everywhere off-piste, playfulness is nice"

Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Weak match on: playfulness. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip"

Salomon QST 106 strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Weak match on: stiffness, playfulness, powder_float. Review: "not as stable as heavier chargers" Review: "Handles variable snow conditions with ease" Review: "Playful enough for drops and airs"

K2 Mindbender 108Ti strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "charging machine, stiff and damp" Review: "Stiff, damp, incredibly stable" Review: "Decent playfulness for a charger"

Moderate match on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Weak match on: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "Incredibly playful — you can butter, spin, and smear with ease" Review: "Pop off everything, spin easily, land softly" Review: "Not a charger — gets unstable above moderate speeds"

Moderate match on: stiffness. Weak match on: playfulness, stability_at_speed, powder_float. Review: "Downhill in powder is pure bliss" Review: "Handles beautifully in open bowls" Review: "in Uphill efficiency is great."

Moderate match on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Weak match on: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "More playful than heavy titanal powder skis" Review: "playful enough to navigate tight trees" Review: "wish it had a bit more stability at speed"

ground_truth.reason: Big mountain, stiffness 8, stability 9, playfulness 4, 106mm waist
Freeride, stiffness 7, stability 7, but playfulness 8 (too playful)
Freeride, 106mm, but stiffness only 6 and playfulness 7
